residentLines: I might visit the shop later.
guardLines: The gate is watched day and night.
If you're headed to the dungeon, be prepared.
Night watch is the quiet kind of dangerous.
Steel on my belt, stone under my feet. Just another shift.
shopkeeperLines: Open by dawn, closed by dusk.
If the roads stay safe, prices stay fair.
I know good stock when I see it.
Travelers bring the strangest things to market.

lines: Road dust on every crate, friend.
I buy oddities if the price is right.
Caravans come late these days.
Tools, trinkets, and things with stories.
If you found it outside the walls, I might know someone who wants it.
Mind the sparks.
A dull blade is a debt waiting to be paid.
Iron speaks when you hit it right.
Bring me metal and coin, and I will make both useful.
Good armor is cheaper than a funeral.
Try the straps before you trust the steel.
A shield saves what pride loses.
If it does not fit, it will fail you.
Do not mix the red one with the blue one.
Fresh herbs, clean bottles, careful hands.
Pain is honest. Infection lies.
A bitter draught is still better than bleeding out.
Beds upstairs if you can pay.
Keep your boots off the tables.
Warm food, warmer rumors.
If trouble starts, take it outside.
Straight boards are rarer than honest maps.
Good wood sings under a sharp plane.
I can fix a door faster than guards can break one.
Mind the splinters.
Fresh bread before noon, crumbs after.
Eat before you bleed.
The sweet buns go first.
A warm loaf can quiet a cold morning.
Fresh goods from the road.
We stay only while the caravan is in town.
Have a look before we move on.
If the road closes, so does my purse.
Buy now. The wheels turn again soon.

harborCaptainLines: Another harbor waits beyond the water.
Two hundred gold and we cast off at once.

specialCats.name: Jekku
lines: Meow.

specialCats.name: Leevi
lines: Meow.

lines: Meow.

lines: Meow.

lines: Wuuf dig
